# Requesting a Price Match

A price match is requested in under fourteen days of order by submitting a link to the competitor's listing, and an approved match is refunded as the difference to the original payment method. Each shopper is limited to three approved price matches in any thirty-day period to discourage reselling.

[Source: price_matching.md#requesting-a-price-match]
